name: Mahavir Jayanti
description: Birth celebration of Bhagwan Mahavir with temple processions, scriptural readings, and seva.
rituals: Snatra puja, Navkar Mantra jap, and daan to community welfare.

name: Paryushan
description: A period of intense introspection, fasting, forgiveness, and spiritual discipline.
rituals: Daily pratikraman, svadhyay, ekasana or upvas, and ahimsa-focused conduct.

name: Samvatsari
description: The supreme day of universal forgiveness and soul purification.
rituals: Samvatsari pratikraman and seeking forgiveness with 'Michhami Dukkadam'.

name: Ayambil Oli
description: Nine-day austerity focused on restrained food and devotional practice.
rituals: Ayambil fasting, Navpad worship, and mantra chanting.

name: Diwali (Mahavir Nirvana)
description: Commemorates the nirvana of Bhagwan Mahavir and the light of spiritual awakening.
rituals: Nirvana laddu offering, deep daan, and scripture recitation.

name: Kartik Poonam
description: A highly auspicious full-moon day dedicated to worship, charity, and pilgrimage.
rituals: Temple darshan, snatra puja, and disciplined devotional practices.
